properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You call the sun to rise And You lay it down to rest You hold this heart of mine And You hold my every breath

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Such an awesome God So mighty So holy So wonderful Such an awesome God So selfless So generous So faithful, You are

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Seated in majesty Reigning in holiness The table is set for me For You are the living bread

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: And nothing comes close to the Lord Almighty Nothing as sweet as His love and mercy Nothing comes close to the Lord Almighty And nothing as sweet as Your love and mercy

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Oh, nothing comes close to the Lord Almighty Nothing as sweet as His love and mercy Oh, nothing comes close to the Lord Almighty Nothing as sweet as Your love and mercy

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: There's nothing sweeter, sweeter than Your love Jesus, the Son of God Hung on a Cross to die But not even death itself Could hold You down, for You rose to life

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: The name of God is mercy Oh, the name of God is love Oh, the name of God is kindness And He's pouring out on us Oh, He's pouring out on us

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Oh, the name of God is mercy Yes, it is, yes, it is Oh, the name of God is love Oh, the name of God is kindness

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: And You're pouring out on us Oh, You're pouring out on us You're pouring out (You're pouring out on us) You're pouring out on us (You're pouring out on us) You're redefining love to me (You're pouring out on us)
